name: Trading company
description: Layer-1 infrastructure (database + memory + vector) plus Layer-2 trading add-ons: Treasury registration, venue allow-list, Rule-1 parity enforcement, and per-trade autopsy/post-mortem/feedback routines. Ships with a single CEO agent (Claude Sonnet 4 on OpenRouter) so the company is runnable the moment provisioning finishes — hire more agents yourself via the 'Hire agent' wizard.
